title: N+1 query in loop
diff:
diff --git a/report.py b/report.py
--- a/report.py
+++ b/report.py
@@ -4,6 +4,8 @@ def generate_order_report(customer_ids):
-    orders = db.query(Order).filter(Order.customer_id.in_(customer_ids)).all()
+    orders = []
+    for cid in customer_ids:
+        orders.extend(db.query(Order).filter_by(customer_id=cid).all())
     return format_report(orders)

ground_truth.description: N+1 query: replaced efficient IN query with per-customer loop, hitting DB N times
